node.label: Input
node.description: The input signal to be processed.

node.label: Output
node.description: The input signal to be processed.

node.label: Input
node.description: The input signal to be processed.

node.label: Output
node.description: The input signal to be processed.

microprocessor_definition.name: Aexel Step Up Step Down Switch

node.label: Value
node.description: Value to be processed for step up OR down.

node.label: Output
node.description: The output signal to be processed.

microprocessor_definition.name: Automatic Master/Slave System
microprocessor_definition.description: A master/slave system that determines how the locomotives are coupled together and changes throttle value accordingly

node.label: Throttle In
node.description: From a lever or a controller

node.label: Throttle Out
node.description: To your engines/motors

node.label: Front Connector Out
node.description: Connect to the front connector

node.label: Rear Connector Out
node.description: Connect to the rear connector

node.label: Front Connector In
node.description: Connect to the front connector

node.label: Rear Connector In
node.description: Connect to the rear connector

node.label: Master Toggle Button
node.description: A toggle button to assign the locomotive as master

node.label: Brake Out
node.description: To the train wheels

node.label: Brake In
node.description: From a lever or a brake controller

node.label: Composite Master/Reverse Toggle Button (Optional)
node.description: You can use this instead of the on/off node if you would like to use an instrument panel (select channel from the mc settings)

node.label: Composite Output Front (Optional)
node.description: If you have any other composite going through the connectors, you can use this (Not For Connectors!)

node.label: Composite Input Front (Optional)
node.description: If you have any other composite going through the connectors, you can use this (Not For Connectors!)

node.label: Composite Output Rear (Optional)
node.description: If you have any other composite going through the connectors, you can use this (Not For Connectors!)

node.label: Composite Input Rear (Optional)
node.description: If you have any other composite going through the connectors, you can use this (Not For Connectors!)

node.label: Clutch Out
node.description: Goes to your clutch (For non-electric trains)

node.label: Clutch In
node.description: From a clutch lever (For non-electric trains)

node.label: Gearbox Reverse Button
node.description: Connect your reverse button if you are using a gearbox for reverse

node.label: Gearbox Output
node.description: Connect to your gearbox if you are using one for reverse

node.label: Uncouple Local
node.description: The input signal to be processed.

object.script:
local rev = 0 -- 0, 1, 2 local armBack = true -- re-arms when button released local armFwd = true local timer = 0 -- timer for the 1-second delay local inState2 = false -- flag to track if we're in state 2
function onTick() local back = input.getBool(1) -- Backwards key local fwd = input.getBool(2) -- Forwards key
-- Handle state transitions if back and armBack and not fwd then rev = 0 armBack = false elseif fwd and armFwd and not back then rev = rev + 1 if rev > 2 then rev = 2 end -- Cap at 2 if rev == 2 then inState2 = true timer = 1 -- Start 1-second timer end armFwd = false end
-- Re-arm when released if not back then armBack = true end if not fwd then armFwd = true end
-- Handle timer for state 2 if inState2 then timer = timer - (1/60) -- Assuming 60 ticks per second if timer <= 0 then rev = 1 inState2 = false end end
-- Output logic output.setNumber(1, rev) output.setBool(1, rev == 1) -- Master on (state 1) output.setBool(2, rev == 2) -- Uncoupled, no master (state 2, for 1 second) output.setBool(3, false) -- Unused end

microprocessor_definition.name: AEXEL MAIN TRAIN SYSTEM MTS AEXEL442 VAR.

object.script:
-- AEX Panel: Reverser v1.3 (edge-only, no timer) local rev = 0 -- -1,0,+1 local armBack = true -- re-arms when button released local armFwd = true
function onTick() local back = input.getBool(1) local fwd = input.getBool(2) local master = input.getBool(3)
if not master then rev = 0 -- keep arming logic intact so it works immediately at power-on armBack = not back armFwd = not fwd else -- move once per complete press (must release to re-arm) if back and armBack and not fwd then rev = rev - 1; if rev < -1 then rev = -1 end armBack = false elseif fwd and armFwd and not back then rev = rev + 1; if rev > 1 then rev = 1 end armFwd = false end -- re-arm when released if not back then armBack = true end if not fwd then armFwd = true end end
output.setNumber(1, master and rev or 0) output.setBool(1, rev == -1) output.setBool(2, rev == 0 and master) output.setBool(3, rev == 1) end

-- Input/Smoothing v1.0 lever & brakes smoothing + EB latch + dir sign local gn,gb=input.getNumber,input.getBool local sn,sb=output.setNumber,output.setBool
-- Tunables (same feel as your 755) local RAW_MIN,RAW_MAX=-1.1,1.1 local DEAD_RAW=0.1 local THR_UP,THR_DOWN=0.0055,0.012 local BRK_RAMP=0.06 local IND_BRAKE_DEADZONE=0.03 local RESCALE_AFTER_DZ=true
-- State local thrSm,drvBrkSm,indBrkSm=0,0,0 local EB=false
local function clamp(x,a,b) if x<a then return a elseif x>b then return b else return x end end local function slew(c,t,u,d) if t>c then local dv=t-c; return c+math.min(dv,u) elseif t<c then local dv=c-t; return c-math.min(dv,d) else return c end end local function zone_of(h,dn) if h<=-1.0 then return -5 elseif h<=-0.8 then return -4 elseif h<=-0.6 then return -3 elseif h<=-0.4 then return -2 elseif h<-dn then return -1 elseif h<=dn then return 0 elseif h<=0.3 then return 1 elseif h<=0.5 then return 2 elseif h<=0.7 then return 3 elseif h<=0.9 then return 4 else return 5 end end local function applyDZ(x,dz,rescale) if x<=dz then return 0 elseif rescale then return (x-dz)/(1-dz) else return x end end
function onTick() -- Inputs local leverRaw = gn(1) -- -1.1..+1.1 local B_ind = clamp(gn(2),0,1) -- 0..1 local revSel = gn(3) -- -1/0/+1 from panel local resetEB = gb(1) local invert = gb(2) and -1 or 1 -- optional invert toggle
-- Normalize lever (+ deadzone, with optional invert) leverRaw = clamp(leverRaw, RAW_MIN, RAW_MAX) local h = (leverRaw / RAW_MAX) * invert local dead_n = DEAD_RAW / RAW_MAX if math.abs(h) < dead_n then h = 0 end
-- EB latch on EB notch (respects inversion) if h <= -1.0 then EB = true end if resetEB then EB = false end
-- Split intents local thrIntent = (h>0) and h or 0 local drvIntent = (h<0) and (-h) or 0
-- Smooth thrSm = slew(thrSm, thrIntent, THR_UP, THR_DOWN) drvBrkSm = slew(drvBrkSm, drvIntent, BRK_RAMP,BRK_RAMP) local indIn = applyDZ(B_ind, IND_BRAKE_DEADZONE, RESCALE_AFTER_DZ) indBrkSm = slew(indBrkSm, indIn, BRK_RAMP,BRK_RAMP)
local brkSm = math.min(drvBrkSm + indBrkSm, 1)
-- Direction sign for motors (doesn't interlock traction) local dirSign = (revSel>-0.5 and revSel<0.5) and 0 or (revSel>0 and 1 or -1)
-- Outputs (Numbers) sn(1, thrSm) -- ThrSm 0..1 sn(2, drvBrkSm) -- DriverBrakeSm 0..1 sn(3, indBrkSm) -- IndirectBrakeSm 0..1 sn(4, brkSm) -- TotalBrakeSm 0..1 sn(5, h) -- h normalized (debug) sn(6, zone_of(h,dead_n)) -- Zone index sn(7, dirSign) -- DirSign -1/0/+1
-- Outputs (Bools) sb(1, EB) -- EB latched sb(2, (math.abs(h)<=dead_n)) -- Coast zone lamp end

-- Power Core v1.1 (Interlock variant) split architecture local gn,gb=input.getNumber,input.getBool local sn,sb=output.setNumber,output.setBool local min,max,abs=math.min,math.max,math.abs
-- ===== Interlock toggles ===== -- Turn on the ones you want to actually gate traction: local GATE_MASTER = true local GATE_HV = false local GATE_DOORS = false local GATE_SAFETY = false local GATE_REVERSER = false -- if true, require DirSign ~= 0 for traction
-- ===== Tuning (same 755 feel) ===== local MAIN_UP,MAIN_DOWN=0.0020,0.09 local AUX_UP,AUX_DOWN =0.0010,0.08
local MAIN_CAP_SOFT=0.37 local MAIN_CAP_SLIP=0.20 local SEV_CAP_MAIN=0.10 local BOOST_SPEED_MAX=1.0 local BOOST_MAX_OUT=0.52 local BOOST_MIN_DEMAND=0.60 local BOOST_TICKS_MAX=60 local BOOST_DECAY=0.90
local SLIP_ON,SLIP_OFF=0.07,0.03 local SLIDE_ON,SLIDE_OFF=-0.07,-0.03 local SEV_SLIP_ON=0.15 local START_SLIP_MIN=0.5
local WHEEL_DIAM=0.56 local RIM_PER_REV=math.pi*WHEEL_DIAM local AUX_ON_MS, AUX_FULL_MS = 20.0, 40.0 local AUX_MAX_FRAC=0.22 local AUX_SLIP_CAP=0.05 local START_AUX_FRAC=0.05 local START_AUX_SPEED=3.0
local REGEN_ON_MPS=2.22 local REGEN_OFF_MPS=1.39 local HLL_FULL,HLL_STEP=5.0,0.05
-- Brake Cylinder output local BC_MAX_BAR = 3.8 -- full BC pressure local BC_ALPHA = 0.25 -- smoothing (0..1). Set to 1 for instant.
-- ===== State ===== local smMain,smAux=0,0 local boostTicks=0 local inSlip,inSlide,inSevere=false,false,false local HLL=HLL_FULL local driveCl,genCl=0,0 local BC = 0
-- ===== Helpers ===== local function clamp(x,a,b) return (x<a) and a or ((x>b) and b or x) end local function slew(c,t,u,d) if t>c then local dv=t-c; return c+min(dv,u) elseif t<c then local dv=c-t; return c-min(dv,d) else return c end end local function invLerp(a,b,x) return clamp((x-a)/max(b-a,1e-6),0,1) end
function onTick() -- Inputs from Smoother local thrSm = gn(1) local drvBrkSm = gn(2) local indBrkSm = gn(3) local dirSign = gn(6) -- -1/0/+1 local EB = gb(1)
-- Sensors / options local severeIn = gb(2) local test = gb(3) local master = gb(4) local hv = gb(5) local doors = gb(6) local safety = gb(7)
local wheelRPS = gn(4) local spdMS = gn(5) -- optional
-- Derived local rim_mps = max(0,wheelRPS) * RIM_PER_REV local hasSpeed = (spdMS and spdMS>0)
-- Slip / slide (if train speed present) local slipRatio=0 if hasSpeed then local denom=max(spdMS,(spdMS<START_SLIP_MIN) and 2.0 or 1.0) slipRatio=(rim_mps-spdMS)/denom if (not inSlip) and slipRatio>SLIP_ON then inSlip=true elseif inSlip and slipRatio<SLIP_OFF then inSlip=false end if (not inSlide) and slipRatio<SLIDE_ON then inSlide=true elseif inSlide and slipRatio>SLIDE_OFF then inSlide=false end else inSlip,inSlide=false,false end inSevere = severeIn or (hasSpeed and slipRatio>SEV_SLIP_ON)
-- Motive demand (driver brake cuts power; indirect does not) local motDemand = thrSm if drvBrkSm > 0.05 then motDemand = 0 end
-- Main cap + start-boost local mainCap=MAIN_CAP_SOFT if inSevere then mainCap=min(mainCap,SEV_CAP_MAIN); boostTicks=0 elseif inSlip then mainCap=min(mainCap,MAIN_CAP_SLIP); boostTicks=0 else local speedForBoost = hasSpeed and spdMS or rim_mps if speedForBoost<=BOOST_SPEED_MAX and motDemand>BOOST_MIN_DEMAND then boostTicks=min(BOOST_TICKS_MAX,max(boostTicks,BOOST_TICKS_MAX)) end if boostTicks>0 then mainCap=max(mainCap,BOOST_MAX_OUT) local nearCap=(smMain>(MAIN_CAP_SOFT+0.05)) boostTicks= nearCap and math.floor(boostTicks*BOOST_DECAY) or (boostTicks-1) end end local mainLimited=min(motDemand,mainCap)
-- Total brake local brkSm = clamp(drvBrkSm + indBrkSm, 0, 1)
-- ===== Interlock gating ===== local base_ok = (not EB) if GATE_MASTER then base_ok = base_ok and master end if GATE_HV then base_ok = base_ok and hv end if GATE_DOORS then base_ok = base_ok and doors end if GATE_SAFETY then base_ok = base_ok and safety end
local revOK = (dirSign ~= 0) local traction_ok = base_ok and (not GATE_REVERSER or revOK)
-- For braking/regen we ignore REVERSER & DOORS (you should be able to brake in neutral / with doors), -- but still respect EB, and (optionally) Master/HV/Safety if you enabled them. local brake_ok = base_ok if GATE_DOORS then brake_ok = (not EB) and true end -- ignore doors for braking
-- ===== Clutches ===== if test then driveCl,genCl = 1, 0 brkSm = 0 mainLimited = 0.6 else if traction_ok and mainLimited>0.02 then driveCl,genCl=1,0 elseif brake_ok and brkSm>0.02 then driveCl=1; genCl=(rim_mps>=REGEN_ON_MPS) and 1 or 0 else driveCl,genCl=0,0 end if rim_mps<=REGEN_OFF_MPS then genCl=0 end end
-- ===== Aux blending (speed based + low-speed bonus) ===== local speedRef = hasSpeed and spdMS or rim_mps local auxBlendHigh = invLerp(AUX_ON_MS,AUX_FULL_MS,speedRef) local auxLowBonus = (1.0 - invLerp(0.0,START_AUX_SPEED,speedRef)) * START_AUX_FRAC local auxShare = clamp(AUX_MAX_FRAC*auxBlendHigh + auxLowBonus, 0, AUX_MAX_FRAC) local auxTarget = mainLimited * auxShare if inSevere then auxTarget=0 elseif inSlip then auxTarget=min(auxTarget,AUX_SLIP_CAP) end if brkSm>0.05 then auxTarget=0 end
-- ===== Channel slews ===== smMain=slew(smMain, clamp(mainLimited,0,1)*driveCl, MAIN_UP,MAIN_DOWN) smAux =slew(smAux , clamp(auxTarget ,0,1)*driveCl, AUX_UP ,AUX_DOWN )
-- ===== Brakes & HLL ===== local regenCmd=brkSm*genCl local airCmd =clamp(brkSm-regenCmd,0,1) -- Brake Cylinder (smoothed from airCmd) local BC_tgt = airCmd * BC_MAX_BAR BC = BC + (BC_tgt - BC) * BC_ALPHA
if EB then regenCmd,airCmd=0,1 end
local HLL_tgt=HLL_FULL*(1-airCmd); local dH=HLL_tgt-HLL if dH>0 then HLL=HLL+min(dH,HLL_STEP) else HLL=HLL+max(dH,-HLL_STEP) end
-- Convenience traction local tractionUnsigned = (smMain+smAux) local tractionSigned = tractionUnsigned*driveCl*dirSign
-- ===== Outputs ===== sn(1,smMain) sn(2,smAux) sn(3,brkSm) sn(4,regenCmd) sn(5,airCmd) sn(6,HLL) sn(9,driveCl) sn(10,genClutch and 1 or 0) -- safety: ensure numeric 0/1 sn(10,genCl) sn(11,mainCap) sn(13,tractionSigned) sn(14,tractionUnsigned) sn(15, BC) -- BrakeCylinder_bar
sb(1,inSlip) sb(2,inSevere) end

node.label: Reading Light
node.description: The input signal to be processed.

node.label: Breaker Light
node.description: The input signal to be processed.

object.script:
-- AEX Panel: Reverser v1.3 (edge-only, no timer) local rev = 0 -- -1,0,+1 local armBack = true -- re-arms when button released local armFwd = true
function onTick() local back = input.getBool(1) local fwd = input.getBool(2) local master = input.getBool(3)
if not master then rev = 0 -- keep arming logic intact so it works immediately at power-on armBack = not back armFwd = not fwd else -- move once per complete press (must release to re-arm) if back and armBack and not fwd then rev = rev - 1; if rev < -1 then rev = -1 end armBack = false elseif fwd and armFwd and not back then rev = rev + 1; if rev > 1 then rev = 1 end armFwd = false end -- re-arm when released if not back then armBack = true end if not fwd then armFwd = true end end
output.setNumber(1, master and rev or 0) output.setBool(1, rev == -1) output.setBool(2, rev == 0 and master) output.setBool(3, rev == 1) end

microprocessor_definition.name: AEX442 Cabin lights
microprocessor_definition.description: A master/slave system that determines how the locomotives are coupled have cabin lights

node.label: Rear Connector Out
node.description: Connect to the rear connector

node.description: Connect to the front connector

node.description: Connect to the rear connector

node.description: To the cabin

node.description: push button

node.label: Throttle

object.script:
-- MAIN HUD: Speed dial + optional Power column + 4 buttons (Power, Night, MPH, Lines) -- Touch: B1,B2 ; N1=W, N2=H, N3/4=t1 x/y, N5/6=t2 x/y (pixels) -- Train: N7=speed km/h, N8=brake %, N9=traction %
local W,H=64,64 local spd,brk,trac=0,0,0 local tick=0 local p1,p2=false,false local t1x,t1y,t2x,t2y=0,0,0,0 local p1p,p2p=false,false
-- toggles local M_PWR=false -- side power bar local M_NIGHT=false -- night palette local M_UNIT=false -- mph local M_TICKS=true -- dial ticks
-- palette (day/night from earlier) local function C3(c) screen.setColor(c[1],c[2],c[3]) end local BG_DAY={8,10,14}; local BG_NGT={2,3,5} local FG_DAY={235,242,255}; local FG_NGT={225,232,242} local DIM_D ={140,150,165}; local DIM_N={115,125,135} local ACC_D ={140,190,250}; local ACC_N={110,160,230} local OK_D ={85,220,120}; local OK_N ={65,180,95} local BRK_D ={255,180,70}; local BRK_N={210,150,60} local FACE_D={26,30,42}; local FACE_N={16,18,24} local EDGE_D={45,54,70}; local EDGE_N={32,38,50} local function pal() if M_NIGHT then return BG_NGT,FG_NGT,DIM_N,ACC_N,OK_N,BRK_N,FACE_N,EDGE_N else return BG_DAY,FG_DAY,DIM_D,ACC_D,OK_D,BRK_D,FACE_D,EDGE_D end end
local function rect(x,y,w,h,f) if f then screen.drawRectF(x,y,w,h) else screen.drawRect(x,y,w,h) end end local function clamp(x,a,b) return x<a and a or (x>b and b or x) end local function hit(x,y,w,h,px,py) return px>=x and px<=x+w and py>=y and py<=y+h end local function panel(x,y,w,h,FACE,EDGE) C3(FACE); rect(x,y,w,h,true); C3(EDGE); rect(x,y,w,h,false) end
local function drawDial(cx,cy,r,value,maxK,BG,DIM,ACC,FG) local n=clamp(value/maxK,0,1) screen.setColor(24,28,38); screen.drawCircleF(cx,cy,r+2) C3(BG); screen.drawCircleF(cx,cy,r) if M_TICKS then for k=0,maxK,20 do local a=math.pi*0.75+(k/maxK)*(math.pi*1.5) C3(DIM); local r1,r2=r-2,r-6 screen.drawLine(cx+math.cos(a)*r1,cy+math.sin(a)*r1,cx+math.cos(a)*r2,cy+math.sin(a)*r2) end end local a=math.pi*0.75+n*(math.pi*1.5) C3(ACC); screen.drawLine(cx,cy,cx+math.cos(a)*(r-8),cy+math.sin(a)*(r-8)) screen.drawCircleF(cx,cy,2) C3(FG); screen.drawTextBox(cx-r, cy-r+2, r*2,10, string.format("%3.0f", value), 0,-1) C3(DIM); screen.drawTextBox(cx-r, cy-r+12, r*2,8, M_UNIT and "mph" or "km/h", 0,-1) end
-- center-zero power bar (up=traction, down=brake) local function drawPower(x,y,w,h,tracPct,brkPct,OK,BRK,FACE,EDGE) C3(FACE); rect(x,y,w,h,true); C3(EDGE); rect(x,y,w,h,false) local mid=y+h/2; C3(EDGE); screen.drawLine(x+2,mid,x+w-2,mid) local up=clamp((tracPct>0 and tracPct or 0)/100,0,1) if up>0 then C3(OK); rect(x+2, mid-up*(h/2-3), w-4, up*(h/2-3), true) end local dn=clamp(brkPct/100,0,1) if dn>0 then C3(BRK); rect(x+2, mid+1, w-4, dn*(h/2-3), true) end end
-- tiny icons local function ic_power(x,y,w,h,OK,BRK) C3(OK); rect(x+w/2-1,y+3,2,(h-6)/2-1,true); C3(BRK); rect(x+w/2-1,y+h/2+1,2,(h-6)/2-2,true) end local function ic_moon(x,y,w,h,OK) C3(OK); screen.drawCircleF(x+w/2,y+h/2, math.min(w,h)/3); screen.setColor(0,0,0); screen.drawCircleF(x+w/2+2,y+h/2, math.min(w,h)/3) end local function ic_swap(x,y,w,h,OK) C3(OK); screen.drawLine(x+2,y+h/2-2,x+w-3,y+h/2-2); screen.drawLine(x+w-3,y+h/2-2,x+w-6,y+h/2-5); screen.drawLine(x+w-3,y+h/2-2,x+w-6,y+h/2+1); screen.drawLine(x+w-3,y+h/2+2,x+2,y+h/2+2) end local function ic_ticks(x,y,w,h,OK) C3(OK); local cx,cy=x+w/2,y+h/2; local r=math.min(w,h)/3+1; screen.drawCircleF(cx,cy,r); screen.setColor(0,0,0); screen.drawCircleF(cx,cy,r-2) end
local BTN={} local HUD_BTNS={ {active=function()return M_PWR end, toggle=function()M_PWR=not M_PWR end, icon=function(x,y,w,h,OK,BRK) ic_power(x,y,w,h,OK,BRK) end}, {active=function()return M_NIGHT end, toggle=function()M_NIGHT=not M_NIGHT end, icon=function(x,y,w,h,OK) ic_moon(x,y,w,h,OK) end}, {active=function()return M_UNIT end, toggle=function()M_UNIT=not M_UNIT end, icon=function(x,y,w,h,OK) ic_swap(x,y,w,h,OK) end}, {active=function()return M_TICKS end, toggle=function()M_TICKS=not M_TICKS end, icon=function(x,y,w,h,OK) ic_ticks(x,y,w,h,OK) end}, }
local function drawButtonsRow(x0,y0,wTotal,hRow,items,FACE,EDGE,OK,BRK) BTN={} local pad=2; local count=#items local tileW=(wTotal - pad*(count+1))/count for i=1,count do local it=items[i] local x=x0 + pad*i + tileW*(i-1) local y=y0+2; local w=tileW; local h=hRow-4 BTN[i]={x=x,y=y,w=w,h=h,toggle=it.toggle} panel(x,y,w,h,FACE,EDGE) local act=it.active(); if act then C3(OK); screen.drawRectF(x+2,y+2,w-4,h-4) end it.icon(x,y,w,h, ACC_D, BRK_D) end end
function onTick() p1=input.getBool(1) or false; p2=input.getBool(2) or false W =input.getNumber(1) or W; H =input.getNumber(2) or H t1x=input.getNumber(3) or 0; t1y=input.getNumber(4) or 0 t2x=input.getNumber(5) or 0; t2y=input.getNumber(6) or 0 spd=input.getNumber(7) or 0; brk=input.getNumber(8) or 0; trac=input.getNumber(9) or 0 tick=tick+1 end
function onDraw() local BG,FG,DIM,ACC,OK,BRK,FACE,EDGE=pal() local sW,sH=screen.getWidth(),screen.getHeight(); if sW>0 and sH>0 then W,H=sW,sH end local SIZ=math.min(W,H); local X0=(W-SIZ)/2; local Y0=(H-SIZ)/2 C3(BG); screen.drawRectF(0,0,W,H)
local pad=math.max(2, math.floor(SIZ*0.03)) local headerH=math.max(9, math.floor(SIZ*0.13)) local buttonsH=math.max(14, math.floor(SIZ*0.22)) local bodyH=SIZ-headerH-buttonsH-pad*2
-- header panel(X0,Y0,SIZ,headerH,FACE,EDGE) C3(DIM); screen.drawText(X0+pad, Y0+2, "AEX442") local mins=math.floor((tick/60)%60); local hrs=math.floor((tick/3600)%24) C3(ACC); screen.drawTextBox(X0+pad, Y0+1, SIZ-pad*2, headerH-2, string.format("%02d:%02d",hrs,mins), 1,-1)
-- body local bodyX=X0+pad; local bodyY=Y0+headerH+pad; local bodyW=SIZ-pad*2 panel(bodyX,bodyY,bodyW,bodyH,FACE,EDGE)
local dialW = M_PWR and math.floor(bodyW*0.74) or bodyW local pwrW = M_PWR and (bodyW - dialW - 2) or 0 local cx=bodyX + dialW/2; local cy=bodyY + bodyH*0.56; local r=math.min(dialW,bodyH)*0.46 local maxK=160; local v = M_UNIT and (spd*0.621371) or spd drawDial(cx,cy,r, v, maxK, BG, DIM, ACC, FG) if M_PWR then drawPower(bodyX + dialW + 2, bodyY+2, pwrW, bodyH-4, trac, brk, OK, BRK, FACE, EDGE) end
-- buttons row local gridY = Y0 + SIZ - buttonsH drawButtonsRow(X0, gridY, SIZ, buttonsH, HUD_BTNS, FACE, EDGE, OK, BRK)
-- touch edges local function press(px,py,was,is) if is and not was then for i=1,#BTN do local b=BTN[i]; if hit(b.x,b.y,b.w,b.h,px,py) then b.toggle() end end end end press(t1x,t1y,p1p,p1); press(t2x,t2y,p2p,p2) p1p,p2p=p1,p2 end

-- LEFT SCREEN: Power & Brakes (low-detail, left-side companion) -- Touch: B1,B2 ; N1=W, N2=H, N3/4=t1 x/y, N5/6=t2 x/y -- Train: N8=brake %, N9=traction %, N10=MR pressure, N11=BC pressure, N12=Doors(0/1), N13=Head(0/1), N14=Haz(0/1)
local W,H=64,64 local brk,trac=0,0 local mr,bc=0,0 local doors,head,haz=0,0,0 local p1,p2=false,false local t1x,t1y,t2x,t2y=0,0,0,0 local p1p,p2p=false,false
-- toggles local M_NIGHT=false local M_LINES=true
-- palette local function C3(c) screen.setColor(c[1],c[2],c[3]) end local BG_DAY={8,10,14}; local BG_NGT={2,3,5} local FG_DAY={235,242,255}; local FG_NGT={225,232,242} local DIM_D ={140,150,165}; local DIM_N={115,125,135} local OK_D ={85,220,120}; local OK_N ={65,180,95} local BRK_D ={255,180,70}; local BRK_N={210,150,60} local FACE_D={26,30,42}; local FACE_N={16,18,24} local EDGE_D={45,54,70}; local EDGE_N={32,38,50} local function pal() if M_NIGHT then return BG_NGT,FG_NGT,DIM_N,OK_N,BRK_N,FACE_N,EDGE_N else return BG_DAY,FG_DAY,DIM_D,OK_D,BRK_D,FACE_D,EDGE_D end end
local function rect(x,y,w,h,f) if f then screen.drawRectF(x,y,w,h) else screen.drawRect(x,y,w,h) end end local function clamp(x,a,b) return x<a and a or (x>b and b or x) end local function hit(x,y,w,h,px,py) return px>=x and px<=x+w and py>=y and py<=y+h end local function panel(x,y,w,h,FACE,EDGE) C3(FACE); rect(x,y,w,h,true); C3(EDGE); rect(x,y,w,h,false) end
-- center-zero power column local function powerCol(x,y,w,h,tracPct,brkPct,OK,BRK,FACE,EDGE,LINES) C3(FACE); rect(x,y,w,h,true); C3(EDGE); rect(x,y,w,h,false) local mid=y+h/2; if LINES then C3(EDGE); screen.drawLine(x+2,mid,x+w-2,mid) end local up=clamp((tracPct>0 and tracPct or 0)/100,0,1) if up>0 then C3(OK); rect(x+2, mid-up*(h/2-3), w-4, up*(h/2-3), true) end local dn=clamp(brkPct/100,0,1) if dn>0 then C3(BRK); rect(x+2, mid+1, w-4, dn*(h/2-3), true) end end
-- small horizontal bar (0..1) local function hbar(x,y,w,h,v,COL,FACE,EDGE,LINES) C3(FACE); rect(x,y,w,h,true); C3(EDGE); rect(x,y,w,h,false) if LINES then C3(EDGE); screen.drawLine(x+2,y+h/2,x+w-2,y+h/2) end C3(COL); rect(x+2, y+2, (w-4)*clamp(v,0,1), h-4, true) end
-- lamps local function lamp(x,y,w,h,on,COL,FACE,EDGE) C3(FACE); rect(x,y,w,h,true); C3(EDGE); rect(x,y,w,h,false) if on==1 then C3(COL); rect(x+2,y+2,w-4,h-4,true) end end
-- buttons: Night, Lines local BTN={} local function drawButtons(x0,y0,wTot,hRow,FACE,EDGE,OK) BTN={} local items={ {active=function()return M_NIGHT end, toggle=function()M_NIGHT=not M_NIGHT end, icon=function(x,y,w,h) C3(OK); screen.drawCircleF(x+w/2,y+h/2, math.min(w,h)/3); screen.setColor(0,0,0); screen.drawCircleF(x+w/2+2,y+h/2, math.min(w,h)/3) end}, {active=function()return M_LINES end, toggle=function()M_LINES=not M_LINES end, icon=function(x,y,w,h) C3(OK); local cx,cy=x+w/2,y+h/2; local r=math.min(w,h)/3+1; screen.drawCircleF(cx,cy,r); screen.setColor(0,0,0); screen.drawCircleF(cx,cy,r-2) end}, } local pad=2; local count=#items; local tileW=(wTot - pad*(count+1))/count for i=1,count do local it=items[i] local x=x0 + pad*i + tileW*(i-1); local y=y0+2; local w=tileW; local h=hRow-4 BTN[i]={x=x,y=y,w=w,h=h,toggle=it.toggle} panel(x,y,w,h,FACE,EDGE); if it.active() then C3(OK); screen.drawRectF(x+2,y+2,w-4,h-4) end it.icon(x,y,w,h) end end
function onTick() p1=input.getBool(1) or false; p2=input.getBool(2) or false W =input.getNumber(1) or W; H =input.getNumber(2) or H t1x=input.getNumber(3) or 0; t1y=input.getNumber(4) or 0 t2x=input.getNumber(5) or 0; t2y=input.getNumber(6) or 0
brk =input.getNumber(8) or 0 trac=input.getNumber(9) or 0 mr =input.getNumber(10) or 0 -- main reservoir (map your kPa/psi -> 0..1 as you like) bc =input.getNumber(11) or 0 -- brake cylinder doors=input.getNumber(12) or 0 head =input.getNumber(13) or 0 haz =input.getNumber(14) or 0 end
function onDraw() local BG,FG,DIM,OK,BRK,FACE,EDGE=pal() local sW,sH=screen.getWidth(),screen.getHeight(); if sW>0 and sH>0 then W,H=sW,sH end local SIZ=math.min(W,H); local X0=(W-SIZ)/2; local Y0=(H-SIZ)/2 C3(BG); screen.drawRectF(0,0,W,H)
local pad=math.max(2, math.floor(SIZ*0.03)) local headerH=math.max(9, math.floor(SIZ*0.13)) local buttonsH=math.max(14, math.floor(SIZ*0.22)) local bodyH=SIZ-headerH-buttonsH-pad*2
-- header panel(X0,Y0,SIZ,headerH,FACE,EDGE) C3(DIM); screen.drawText(X0+pad, Y0+2, "AEX442 L")
-- body local bodyX=X0+pad; local bodyY=Y0+headerH+pad; local bodyW=SIZ-pad*2 panel(bodyX,bodyY,bodyW,bodyH,FACE,EDGE)
-- layout: big power bar + two small air bars + three lamps local powW=math.floor(bodyW*0.55) powerCol(bodyX, bodyY+2, powW, bodyH-4, trac, brk, OK, BRK, FACE, EDGE, M_LINES)
local rightX=bodyX + powW + 2 local rW=bodyW - powW - 2
-- Air bars (MR, BC) stacked local barH=10 hbar(rightX, bodyY+2, rW, barH, mr, OK, FACE, EDGE, M_LINES) -- MR hbar(rightX, bodyY+2+barH+2, rW, barH, bc, BRK, FACE, EDGE, M_LINES) -- BC
-- Lamps row (Doors/Head/Haz) local ly=bodyY + bodyH - 12 local gap=2; local lw=(rW - gap*2)/3 lamp(rightX, ly,lw,10, doors, BRK, FACE, EDGE) lamp(rightX+lw+gap, ly,lw,10, head, OK, FACE, EDGE) lamp(rightX+2*(lw+gap), ly,lw,10, haz, BRK, FACE, EDGE)
-- buttons (Night, Lines) local gridY = Y0 + SIZ - buttonsH drawButtons(X0, gridY, SIZ, buttonsH, FACE, EDGE, OK)
-- touch edges local function press(px,py,was,is) if is and not was then for i=1,#BTN do local b=BTN[i]; if hit(b.x,b.y,b.w,b.h,px,py) then b.toggle() end end end end press(t1x,t1y,p1p,p1); press(t2x,t2y,p2p,p2) p1p,p2p=p1,p2 end

local a,b=64,64 local c,d=false,false local e,f,g,h=0,0,0,0 local i,j=false,false local k=0 local l=false local m=false local n=false local o=false local p=0 local q={0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0} local r=false local s={} local t={255,80,0} local u={255,0,0} local function v(w) screen.setColor(w[1],w[2],w[3]) end local x={8,10,14} local y={235,242,255} local z={140,150,165} local A={140,190,250} local B={85,220,120} local C={255,95,95} local D={26,30,42} local E={45,54,70} local F={2,3,5} local G={225,232,242} local H={115,125,135} local I={110,160,230} local J={65,180,95} local K={220,80,80} local L={16,18,24} local M={32,38,50} local N={12,5,18} local O={230,210,255} local P={160,120,180} local Q={190,90,255} local R={100,255,200} local S={255,60,160} local T={20,10,28} local U={50,30,70} local function V() if o then return N,O,P,Q,R,S,T,U elseif l then return F,G,H,I,J,K,L,M else return x,y,z,A,B,C,D,E end end local function W(X,Y,Z,_,a0) if a0 then screen.drawRectF(X,Y,Z,_)else screen.drawRect(X,Y,Z,_) end end local function a1(X,Y,Z,_,a2,a3) return a2>=X and a2<=X+Z and a3>=Y and a3<=Y+_ end local function a4(X,Y,Z,_,a5,a6) v(a5) W(X,Y,Z,_,true) v(a6) W(X,Y,Z,_,false) end local function a7(X,Y,Z,_,a8,a9) local aa,ab,ac=a8[1],a8[2],a8[3]if a9 then aa,ab,ac=120,120,120 end screen.setColor(aa,ab,ac) screen.drawCircleF(X+Z/2,Y+_/2,math.min(Z,_)/3) screen.setColor(0,0,0) screen.drawCircleF(X+Z/2+2,Y+_/2,math.min(Z,_)/3) if a9 then screen.setColor(120,120,120) screen.drawLine(X+2,Y+_-3,X+Z-3,Y+3) end end local function ad(X,Y,Z,_,ae) screen.setColor(ae[1],ae[2],ae[3]) screen.drawLine(X+2,Y+_/2,X+Z-3,Y+_/2) screen.drawLine(X+Z-7,Y+3,X+Z-3,Y+_/2) screen.drawLine(X+Z-7,Y+_-3,X+Z-3,Y+_/2) end local function af(X,Y,Z,_,ae) screen.setColor(ae[1],ae[2],ae[3]) screen.drawLine(X+2,Y+_/2,X+6,Y+_/2-3) screen.drawLine(X+2,Y+_/2,X+6,Y+_/2+3) screen.drawLine(X+6,Y+_/2-3,X+10,Y+_/2) screen.drawLine(X+2,Y+2,X+Z-2,Y+_-2) end local function ag(X,Y,Z,_,ae) screen.setColor(ae[1],ae[2],ae[3]) screen.drawRect(X+3,Y+3,Z-6,_-6,false) screen.drawLine(X+3,Y+6,X+Z-3,Y+6) end local function ah(X,Y,Z,_,ae) screen.setColor(ae[1],ae[2],ae[3]) W(X+3,Y+2,Z-6,_-4,false) screen.drawLine(X+3,Y+6,X+Z-3,Y+6) end local function ai(aj,ak,al,am,a5,a6,an) s={} local ao=5 local ap=2 local aq=(al-ap*(ao+1))/ao for ar=1,ao do local X=aj+ap*ar+aq*(ar-1) local Y=ak+al-am+2 local Z=aq local _=am-4 a4(X,Y,Z,_,a5,a6) local as,a9=false if ar==1 then as="night" a9=o if l and not a9 then v(an) W(X+2,Y+2,Z-4,_-4,true) end a7(X,Y,Z,_,an,a9) elseif ar==2 then as="ack" if r then local at=k%20<10 local au=at and t or u screen.setColor(au[1],au[2],au[3]) W(X+2,Y+2,Z-4,_-4,true) elseif n then v(an) W(X+2,Y+2,Z-4,_-4,true) end ad(X,Y,Z,_,an) elseif ar==3 then as="mute" if m then v(an) W(X+2,Y+2,Z-4,_-4,true) end af(X,Y,Z,_,an) elseif ar==4 then as="hivis" if o then v(an) W(X+2,Y+2,Z-4,_-4,true) end ag(X,Y,Z,_,an)else as="page" if p==1 then v(an) W(X+2,Y+2,Z-4,_-4,true) end ah(X,Y,Z,_,an) end s[#s+1]={x=X,y=Y,w=Z,h=_,id=as,disabled=a9} end end local av={"TRAC" ,"BRAKE" ,"DOOR" ,"LINE" ,"BATT" ,"TEMP" ,"EMERG" ,"WARN" } local function aw(ax,ay,az,aA,a5,a6,aB,aC,aD,aE,aF) if not aE then a4(ax,ay,az,aA,a5,a6) v(aB) screen.drawRectF(ax+4,ay+4,az-8,aA-8,true) v(aD) screen.drawTextBox(ax,ay+aA/2-4,az,8,"OK" ,0,0) return end if aF then v(aC) screen.drawRect(ax-1,ay-1,az+2,aA+2,false) end local aG,aH=2,4 local ap=2 local aI=(az-ap*(aH+1))/aH local aJ=(aA-ap*(aG+1))/aG for aa=0,aG-1 do for w=0,aH-1 do local ar=aa*aH+w+1 local X=ax+ap*(w+1)+aI*w local Y=ay+ap*(aa+1)+aJ*aa a4(X,Y,aI,aJ,a5,a6) local aK=(q[ar]or 0)>0.5 if aK then v(aC) W(X+2,Y+2,aI-4,aJ-4,true)else v(aD) screen.drawRect(X+3,Y+3,aI-6,aJ-6,false) end end end end local function aL(ax,ay,az,aA,a5,a6,aM,aD) local aG,aH=2,4 local ap=2 local aI=(az-ap*(aH+1))/aH local aJ=(aA-ap*(aG+1))/aG for aa=0,aG-1 do for w=0,aH-1 do local ar=aa*aH+w+1 local X=ax+ap*(w+1)+aI*w local Y=ay+ap*(aa+1)+aJ*aa a4(X,Y,aI,aJ,a5,a6) v(aD) screen.drawRect(X+3,Y+3,aI-6,aJ-6,false) v(aM) screen.drawTextBox(X+2,Y+aJ/2-4,aI-4,8,av[ar],0,0) end end end
function onTick() c=input.getBool(1)or false d=input.getBool(2)or false a=input.getNumber(1)or a b=input.getNumber(2)or b e=input.getNumber(3)or 0 f=input.getNumber(4)or 0 g=input.getNumber(5)or 0 h=input.getNumber(6)or 0 for ar=1,8 do q[ar]=input.getBool(6+ar)and 1 or 0 end k=k+1 n=false local function aN(a2,a3,aO,aP) if aP and not aO then for aQ,ac in ipairs(s)do if a1(ac.x,ac.y,ac.w,ac.h,a2,a3)then if ac.id=="night" and not ac.disabled then l=not l if l then o=false end elseif ac.id=="ack" then n=true r=false elseif ac.id=="mute" then m=not m elseif ac.id=="hivis" then o=not o if o then l=false end elseif ac.id=="page" then p=1-p end end end end end aN(e,f,i,c) aN(g,h,j,d) local aE=false for ar=1,8 do if(q[ar]or 0)>0.5 then aE=true break end end if aE then r=true end output.setBool(1,n) output.setBool(2,m) output.setBool(3,aE) output.setBool(4,o) output.setBool(5,p==1)i,j=c,d end
function onDraw() local aR,aM,aD,an,aB,aC,a5,a6=V() local aS,aT=screen.getWidth() ,screen.getHeight() if aS>0 and aT>0 then a,b=aS,aT end local al=math.min(a,b) local aj=(a-al)/2 local ak=(b-al)/2 v(aR) screen.drawRectF(0,0,a,b) local ap=math.max(2,math.floor(al*0.03)) local aU=math.max(9,math.floor(al*0.13)) local am=math.max(14,math.floor(al*0.22)) local aA=al-aU-am-ap*2 a4(aj,ak,al,aU,a5,a6) v(aD) screen.drawText(aj+ap,ak+2,"AEX442 R" ) local aE=false for ar=1,8 do if(q[ar]or 0)>0.5 then aE=true break end end if not aE and r then local at=k%20<10 local au=at and t or u screen.setColor(au[1],au[2],au[3]) screen.drawRectF(aj+1,ak+aU,al-2,3) screen.setColor(0,0,0) screen.drawText(aj+al/2-8,ak+aU-1,"ACK" ) end local ax=aj+ap local ay=ak+aU+ap local az=al-ap*2 a4(ax,ay,az,aA,a5,a6) if p==0 then local aF=k%30<15 aw(ax,ay,az,aA,a5,a6,aB,aC,aD,aE,aF)else aL(ax,ay,az,aA,a5,a6,aM,aD) end ai(aj,ak,al,am,a5,a6,an)end

node.label: Panel
node.description: pantograph panel

node.label: Pantograph
node.description: raise line, power

node.label: Panel
node.description: pantograph panel

object.script:
-- Pantograph SR-latch (Reset-dominant, master forces down) -- Inputs: 1=Raise (Set), 2=Lower (Reset), 3=Master (Enable) -- Outputs: 1=Pantograph Up, 2=Pantograph Down
local Q = false -- latched state (true = up)
function onTick() local S = input.getBool(1) -- Raise local R = input.getBool(2) -- Lower local EN = input.getBool(3) -- Master
-- Master off = force reset if not EN then Q = false else -- normal SR-latch, reset-dominant if R then Q = false elseif S then Q = true end end
output.setBool(1, Q) -- Pantograph Up output.setBool(2, not Q) -- Pantograph Down end

node.label: Blend Lever
node.description: The input signal to be processed.

node.label: AUX Input
node.description: Input from AEX TMT

node.label: Main Input
node.description: Input from Master/Slave System OR AEX TMT

node.label: AUX Motors
node.description: Connect to motors

object.script:
-- === CONFIG === local LOCAL_OPEN_TIME = 600 -- 10 s @ 60 Hz local CLOSE_BEEP_TIME = 180 -- ~3 s closing beep window (LONGER) -- Buzzer cadences (50% duty) local OPEN_BEEP_INTERVAL = 40 -- SLOWER pulse while OPEN (~1.33 s period) local CLOSE_BEEP_INTERVAL = 3 -- FASTER beeps WHILE CLOSING (~0.10 s period)
-- === STATE === local last_close_btn = false local last_master_btn = false local last_local_btn = false
local master_hold = false -- latched by master open; cleared by close local local_timer = 0 -- counts down when local-open is active local closing_t = 0 -- countdown window for closing beep local osc = 0 -- free-running oscillator for beeps
-- === HELPERS === local function clamp0(x) if x < 0 then return 0 else return x end end
function onTick() -- === INPUTS (channels) === -- 1: door_close (Bool, push) -- 2: door_open_master (Bool, push) -- 3: doors_locked_active (Bool, TRUE = locked / inhibit) -- 4: door_open_local (Bool, push) local door_close = input.getBool(1) local door_open_master = input.getBool(2) local doors_locked_active = input.getBool(3) local door_open_local = input.getBool(4)
osc = (osc + 1) % 1000000
-- === BUTTON EDGES === -- Close button: immediate close, clear master and local, start closing beep if door_close and not last_close_btn then master_hold = false local_timer = 0 if closing_t == 0 then closing_t = CLOSE_BEEP_TIME end end last_close_btn = door_close
-- Master OPEN (push-to-latch). Ignored if locked. if door_open_master and not last_master_btn then if not doors_locked_active then master_hold = true closing_t = 0 -- cancel closing beeps if we reopen end end last_master_btn = door_open_master
-- Local OPEN (push-to-toggle with 10s auto-close). Ignored while master hold. if door_open_local and not last_local_btn then if not master_hold then if local_timer > 0 then -- currently open by local -> close now (with closing beeps) local_timer = 0 if closing_t == 0 then closing_t = CLOSE_BEEP_TIME end else -- currently closed -> open for 10s (if not locked) if not doors_locked_active then local_timer = LOCAL_OPEN_TIME closing_t = 0 end end end end last_local_btn = door_open_local
-- === OPEN COMMAND DECISION === local want_open = (master_hold or (local_timer > 0)) local door_open_cmd = want_open and (not doors_locked_active)
-- If lock becomes active while open, drop open and start closing beep if not door_open_cmd and want_open and doors_locked_active then master_hold = false local_timer = 0 if closing_t == 0 then closing_t = CLOSE_BEEP_TIME end end
-- Local timer countdown (only counts if it's the thing keeping door open) if local_timer > 0 then if door_open_cmd and not master_hold then local_timer = local_timer - 1 if local_timer == 0 then -- auto-close end -> start closing beep (ensures LOCAL close beeps) if closing_t == 0 then closing_t = CLOSE_BEEP_TIME end end end end
-- === BUZZER LOGIC === local buzzer = false if door_open_cmd then -- SLOW pulse while OPEN if (osc % (OPEN_BEEP_INTERVAL * 2)) < OPEN_BEEP_INTERVAL then buzzer = true end closing_t = 0 -- if we reopened, stop closing beeps elseif closing_t > 0 then -- FAST beeps WHILE CLOSING (longer duration) if (osc % (CLOSE_BEEP_INTERVAL * 2)) < CLOSE_BEEP_INTERVAL then buzzer = true end closing_t = closing_t - 1 end
local_timer = clamp0(local_timer) closing_t = clamp0(closing_t)
-- === OUTPUTS (channels) === -- 1: door_open_cmd -- 2: buzzer -- 3: master_hold_active -- 4: local_open_active -- 5: closing_phase -- 6: doors_locked (pass-through) output.setBool(1, door_open_cmd) output.setBool(2, buzzer) output.setBool(3, master_hold) output.setBool(4, local_timer > 0) output.setBool(5, closing_t > 0) output.setBool(6, doors_locked_active) end

-- === CONFIG === local LOCAL_OPEN_TIME = 600 -- 10 s @ 60 Hz local CLOSE_BEEP_TIME = 180 -- ~3 s closing beep window (LONGER) -- Buzzer cadences (50% duty) local OPEN_BEEP_INTERVAL = 40 -- SLOWER pulse while OPEN (~1.33 s period) local CLOSE_BEEP_INTERVAL = 3 -- FASTER beeps WHILE CLOSING (~0.10 s period)
-- === STATE === local last_close_btn = false local last_master_btn = false local last_local_btn = false
local master_hold = false -- latched by master open; cleared by close local local_timer = 0 -- counts down when local-open is active local closing_t = 0 -- countdown window for closing beep local osc = 0 -- free-running oscillator for beeps
-- === HELPERS === local function clamp0(x) if x < 0 then return 0 else return x end end
function onTick() -- === INPUTS (channels) === -- 1: door_close (Bool, push) -- 2: door_open_master (Bool, push) -- 3: doors_locked_active (Bool, TRUE = locked / inhibit) -- 4: door_open_local (Bool, push) local door_close = input.getBool(1) local door_open_master = input.getBool(2) local doors_locked_active = input.getBool(3) local door_open_local = input.getBool(4)
osc = (osc + 1) % 1000000
-- === BUTTON EDGES === -- Close button: immediate close, clear master and local, start closing beep if door_close and not last_close_btn then master_hold = false local_timer = 0 if closing_t == 0 then closing_t = CLOSE_BEEP_TIME end end last_close_btn = door_close
-- Master OPEN (push-to-latch). Ignored if locked. if door_open_master and not last_master_btn then if not doors_locked_active then master_hold = true closing_t = 0 -- cancel closing beeps if we reopen end end last_master_btn = door_open_master
-- Local OPEN (push-to-toggle with 10s auto-close). Ignored while master hold. if door_open_local and not last_local_btn then if not master_hold then if local_timer > 0 then -- currently open by local -> close now (with closing beeps) local_timer = 0 if closing_t == 0 then closing_t = CLOSE_BEEP_TIME end else -- currently closed -> open for 10s (if not locked) if not doors_locked_active then local_timer = LOCAL_OPEN_TIME closing_t = 0 end end end end last_local_btn = door_open_local
-- === OPEN COMMAND DECISION === local want_open = (master_hold or (local_timer > 0)) local door_open_cmd = want_open and (not doors_locked_active)
-- If lock becomes active while open, drop open and start closing beep if not door_open_cmd and want_open and doors_locked_active then master_hold = false local_timer = 0 if closing_t == 0 then closing_t = CLOSE_BEEP_TIME end end
-- Local timer countdown (only counts if it's the thing keeping door open) if local_timer > 0 then if door_open_cmd and not master_hold then local_timer = local_timer - 1 if local_timer == 0 then -- auto-close end -> start closing beep (ensures LOCAL close beeps) if closing_t == 0 then closing_t = CLOSE_BEEP_TIME end end end end
-- === BUZZER LOGIC === local buzzer = false if door_open_cmd then -- SLOW pulse while OPEN if (osc % (OPEN_BEEP_INTERVAL * 2)) < OPEN_BEEP_INTERVAL then buzzer = true end closing_t = 0 -- if we reopened, stop closing beeps elseif closing_t > 0 then -- FAST beeps WHILE CLOSING (longer duration) if (osc % (CLOSE_BEEP_INTERVAL * 2)) < CLOSE_BEEP_INTERVAL then buzzer = true end closing_t = closing_t - 1 end
local_timer = clamp0(local_timer) closing_t = clamp0(closing_t)
-- === OUTPUTS (channels) === -- 1: door_open_cmd -- 2: buzzer -- 3: master_hold_active -- 4: local_open_active -- 5: closing_phase -- 6: doors_locked (pass-through) output.setBool(1, door_open_cmd) output.setBool(2, buzzer) output.setBool(3, master_hold) output.setBool(4, local_timer > 0) output.setBool(5, closing_t > 0) output.setBool(6, doors_locked_active) end

node.label: Master
node.description: The input signal to be processed.

o.custom_name: PROPIERTY: NOT SRC-TCP | IS 'AEXEL CONNECT V1.1'
PROPIERTY: NOT SRC-TCP | IS 'AEXEL CONNECT V1.1'
